description: Get dressed in these sandals from catwalk for a casual look. The interwoven elasticated bands lend a dose of chic style to your appearance, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe.UpperElasticated straps and leather heel cup for comfort and durabilityLeather and elasticated bands on the forefoot and midfoot with a leather backingElasticated straps from the leather heel cup to the forefoot panels for a casual look and to secure the footCushioned synthetic leather covered footbed for added style and durabilityOutsoleTPU outsole with a textured surface for added gripHeel created by a collection of square lugs for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
